data.body: 4e9d COMMITTED (bd1610cd7) + stack PUSHED. ddbe->change 558 PS3 (amended w/ strengthened test; prior votes cleared, re-CIing). 4e9d->NEW change 560. Full suite pre-flight: 4 failed -> 2 real (envelope-contract tests test_e3_txn_bytes + test_provenance_roundtrip pinned old key set; updated to include author_email = correct contract update), 1 perf FLAKE (test_graph_perf passes isolated), 1 pre-existing (resolve_symbol, fails on clean main). Net 0 attributable. Both changes need Verified+1. Pipelining bde5 next.
